note_usd_comparison: Client budget $1.5M USD (approx. MXN 25.5M at ~17 MXN/USD) represents the full project budget including construction. Architecture fee at 12% of construction is MXN 6.84M. Seed data provides explicit architecture_fee of $180,000 USD — this is used in scope-of-work.json payment schedule as the fee reference.
assumptions: This is a preliminary estimate — label as such in all client communications
Cost per sqm source: market benchmark for public_civic in Baja California Sur (Cabo San Lucas): MXN 22,000–35,000/sqm — midpoint MXN 28,500/sqm used
subtotal = MXN 65,550,000; contingency = MXN 6,555,000; total_estimate = MXN 72,105,000
Seed data provides explicit total_architecture_fee_usd = $180,000 USD — used in SOW payment schedule per Tomás protocol
Client budget $1.5M USD is the full project budget (construction + design); architecture fee $180,000 = 12% of construction cost (~$1.5M × 12% = $180,000 USD)
